body:
---
id: note-0089
date: 2025-09-23
topic: team-1-1s
mentions: [priya-menon, dae-jung-kim, sofia-reyes]
---

Ran through my weekly 1-1s today and came away feeling genuinely good about where the team is. [Priya](people/priya-menon) is hitting her stride on the grid-scale storage diligence — she flagged a compelling angle on interconnection queue reform that I hadn't fully considered, and I want to make sure she gets airtime on that at Thursday's IC. [Dae-Jung](people/dae-jung-kim) is still calibrating on sourcing velocity; we talked through prioritization frameworks and I think the click finally happened. He's sharper when he has a clear ranking heuristic rather than an open field. [Sofia](people/sofia-reyes) raised something important about how we're framing AI inference energy costs to founders — she thinks we're underselling our operational expertise, and honestly she's right. Need to revisit the deck intro before the October LP update. These conversations remind me why structured 1-1 time is non-negotiable, even in a heavy deal week. The team surfaces things I'd otherwise miss.
